title: apium montanum
intro: Apium montanum, also known as Wild Celery, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Apium montanum include its ability to aid digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Apium montanum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in soups and salads to harness its medicinal properties.
